zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ryder於1552年6月24日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾紐波特時，他的父親Thomas Ryder25歲，母親Catherine Poole32歲。他於1577年10月7日與Lady Alice Plantagenet在英國巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在英國倫敦被列為lord mayor of london。他去世於1642年8月30日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ryder于1552年6月24日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾紐波特时，他的父亲Thomas Ryder25岁，母亲Catherine Poole32岁。他于1577年10月7日与Lady Alice Plantagenet在英国巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在英国倫敦被列为lord mayor of london。他去世于1642年8月30日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ryder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rider  .
Americanized and Flemish form of Dutch Rijder: occupational name for a mounted warrior or messenger, Middle Dutch rider ‘horseman, rider’.

variants.name: Rider
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ridere ‘horseman’, perhaps with a specific application such as ‘forest ranger’, ‘horseman who guards crops’, or ‘mounted warrior, knight’. Compare Knight .
English: habitational name from Ryther, near Selby (Yorkshire), probably from Old English ryther ‘clearing’.

English: topographic name from Middle English ridere ‘dweller at a clearing’ (see Reeder ) or ‘dweller by a small stream’, depending on which sense of Middle English ride the surname is derived from. These topographic senses of Rider are limited to the southern counties of England (especially Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire), where topographic names in -er and the Middle English words ride ‘clearing’ and rithe ‘small stream’ are mainly found. See also Reed .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ryder was born on 24 June 1552, in Newport, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Ryder, was 25 and his mother, Catherine Poole, was 32. He married Lady Alice Plantagenet on 7 October 1577, in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord mayor of london in London, England. He died on 30 August 1642, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ryder est né le 24 juin 1552, à Newport, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ryder, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine Poole, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Plantagenet le 7 octobre 1577, à Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord mayor of london à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 août 1642, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ryder am 24. Juni 1552 in Newport, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ryder 25 und seine Mutter Catherine Poole 32. Er hat am 7. Oktober 1577 in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England Lady Alice Plantagenet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord mayor of london in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. August 1642 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ryder è nato il il 24 giugno 1552 nel Newport, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Ryder, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Poole, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Plantagenet il 7 ottobre 1577, nel Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord mayor of london nel London, England. Morì il 30 agosto 1642, nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ryderが1552年6月24日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアニュープオルトで生まれた時，父Thomas Ryderは25歳，母Catherine Pooleは32歳であった。1577年10月7日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアニュープオルト プアグネルでLady Alice Plantagenetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリスロンドンでの職業はlord mayor of londonと記録されている。彼は1642年8月30日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアニュープオルト プアグネルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ryder(이)가 1552년 6월 24일 영국 벅잉함실르 뉴포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ryder(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Poole(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1577년 10월 7일 영국 벅잉함실르 뉴포트 파그넬에서 Lady Alice Plantagenet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 lord mayor of london이었다. 그는 1642년 8월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 뉴포트 파그넬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ryder nasceu em 24 de junho de 1552, em Newport, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Ryder, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Poole, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Plantagenet em 7 de outubro de 1577, em Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord mayor of london em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1642, em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ryder родился 24 июня 1552 г. в местности нюпорт, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ryder было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Poole, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Plantagenet 7 октября 1577 г. в местности нюпорт пагнелл, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии lord mayor of london в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 30 августа 1642 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности нюпорт пагнелл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Ryder nació el 24 de junio de 1552, en Newport, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Ryder, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Catherine Poole, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Plantagenet el 7 de octubre de 1577, en Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord mayor of london en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1642, en Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
